_comment: weather-factory parameter set: LMR weighted terms (in 1024ths). Each key MUST match a UCI spin option in src/search_options.rs. Defaults from v2.1.0-claude:src/tune.rs.

LmrExactBound._source: LMR reduction when TT bound is Exact

LmrCutNode._source: LMR extra reduction at cut nodes

LmrShallowTt._source: LMR reduction when TT entry depth < depth-1
